summary: Iteration 16 Testing Complete - Dashboard Cleanup Verification. All backend APIs working (9/9 tests passed). Frontend cleanup verified: no Table/filter bar, no 'Tableau' button in desktop or mobile navigation, chatbot visible and functional, layer controls working, status bar showing parcel count and zoom level.
passed_tests: No 'Tableau' button in desktop navigation - REMOVED
No 'Tableau' button in mobile navigation - REMOVED
No filter inputs in header - REMOVED
Status bar shows parcel count and zoom level
Chatbot (Assistant IA) button visible and opens panel
Side panel shows legend and S3REnR stats
Clear parcels button hidden when no parcels loaded
Zoom indicator shows at low zoom levels (z<14)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses existing infrastructure data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified the Dashboard cleanup requested by user. Key changes verified: 1) ParcelsTable component removed from Dashboard.js. 2) Table import removed. 3) activeView state removed (no more Carte/Tableau toggle). 4) Mobile bottom nav with Carte/Tableau/Stats removed. 5) Building2 import added (was missing). 6) loadParcelsAroundPoint function implemented. All searches now go through AI chatbot exclusively. The app is a land prospection platform for data centers in France - users search via the AI assistant chatbot.

preserved_functionality: Status bar with parcel count and zoom level
Side panel with legend and S3REnR stats
Zoom indicator at low zoom levels

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all backend endpoints are live
